ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the customer registered */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the customer's last login */,
  "email_opt_in" INTEGER /* Whether the customer has opted in for email marketing */,
  "newsletter_subscription" INTEGER /* Whether the customer is subscribed to the newsletter */,
  "loyalty_tier" TEXT /* Loyalty tier of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "product_category" TEXT /* Category of the product */,
  "sub_category" TEXT /* Subcategory of the product */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the product */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the product (length, width, height) */,
  "inventory" INTEGER /* Current inventory level of the product */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Inventory level at which a reorder is triggered */,
  "supplier_id" TEXT /* ID of the supplier for the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_product_category FOREIGN KEY ("product_category") REFERENCES product_categories ("category_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_sub_category FOREIGN KEY ("sub_category") REFERENCES product_categories ("category_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" TEXT /* ID of the customer who made the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was made */,
  "total" REAL /* Total cost of the order */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Billing address for the order */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Status of the order */,
  "shipping_cost" REAL /* Cost of shipping */,
  "tax_amount" REAL /* Tax amount for the order */,
  "discount_amount" REAL /* Discount amount applied to the order */,
  "coupon_code" TEXT /* Coupon code used for the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the item belongs to */,
  "product_id" TEXT /* ID of the product in the order */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in the order */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the product at the time of the order */,
  "discounted_unit_price" REAL /* Discounted unit price of the product at the time of the order */,
  "total_price" REAL /* Total price of the item in the order */,
  "item_status" TEXT /* Status of the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loyalty_scores" (
  "loyalty_score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loyalty score */,
  "customer_id" TEXT /* ID of the customer the score belongs to */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Loyalty score of the customer */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the score was last updated */,
  "points_earned" INTEGER /* Total points earned by the customer */,
  "points_redeemed" INTEGER /* Total points redeemed by the customer */,
  "next_milestone" TEXT /* Next loyalty milestone the customer is approaching */,
  "milestone_date" TEXT /* Date the customer reached a loyalty milestone */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loyalty_score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loyalty_scores_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_categories_parent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category_id") REFERENCES product_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marketing_campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each campaign */,
  "campaign_name" TEXT /* Name of the campaign */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the campaign */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the campaign */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the campaign */,
  "target_audience" TEXT /* Target audience for the campaign */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the campaign */,
  "campaign_type" TEXT /* Type of the campaign */,
  "campaign_status" TEXT /* Status of the campaign */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_password_change" TEXT /* Date the password was last changed */,
  "failed_login_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of failed login attempts */,
  "last_login_attempt" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login attempt */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the user account is active */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Date and time of the last activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
